# MMS Demo - Progress Log for AI Agents

## Project
Fractal Canvas - Train Maintenance Planner Demo
Single Pane of Glass with semantic zoom (Strategic -> Tactical -> Operational)

## Tech Stack
- Astro + React 19 + MUI v6
- Redux Toolkit
- TypeScript (strict)
- Playwright (E2E + visual regression)
- Storybook
- Husky + lint-staged (pre-commit)

## Key Files
- CLAUDE.md: AI agent instructions
- PROMPT.md: How to start sessions
- features.json: Feature tracking
- docs/: Domain documentation

---

## SESSION LOG

### Session 1 - 2025-12-11
**Status:** Harness complete, ready for implementation

**Completed:**
- [x] Read all docs (RFQ, UX, Research, Demo Data)
- [x] Created harness structure
- [x] CLAUDE.md with AI instructions
- [x] PROMPT.md with session prompts
- [x] features.json with setup + features
- [x] Documented: pre-commit hooks, Storybook, visual regression

**Next Session Should:**
1. Run setup-001 to setup-008 (initialize project)
2. Start with core-canvas features
3. Commit after each step

**Git Log:**
- Initial project setup
- Update harness for Fractal Canvas demo
- Add AI harness documentation
- Simplify AI harness
- Add AI quality techniques

---

## HOW TO CONTINUE

Start next session with:
```
Leia claude-progress.txt para ver o estado atual.
Execute o setup inicial seguindo features.json (setup-001 a setup-008).
Commit a cada etapa concluída.
```

Entendido. Vou listar todos os comandos que serão necessários para executar o setup completo do projeto, para que você possa aprovar previamente:

## Comandos necessários para o setup (setup-001 a setup-008):

### Setup 001 - Inicializar Astro
```bash
pnpm create astro@latest . --template minimal --typescript strict --skip-houston --no-install
pnpm install
```

### Setup 002 - React 19
```bash
pnpm astro add react
```

### Setup 003 - MUI v6
```bash
pnpm add @mui/material @mui/icons-material @emotion/react @emotion/styled
```

### Setup 004 - Redux Toolkit
```bash
pnpm add @reduxjs/toolkit react-redux
```

### Setup 005 - ESLint + Prettier
```bash
pnpm add -D eslint prettier eslint-config-prettier eslint-plugin-react eslint-plugin-react-hooks @typescript-eslint/eslint-plugin @typescript-eslint/parser
```

### Setup 006 - Husky + lint-staged
```bash
pnpm add -D husky lint-staged
pnpm exec husky init
```

### Setup 007 - Playwright
```bash
pnpm add -D @playwright/test
pnpm exec playwright install
```

### Setup 008 - Storybook
```bash
pnpm dlx storybook@latest init --builder vite --skip-install
pnpm install
```

### Commits (após cada etapa)
```bash
git add -A && git commit -m "..."
```
